message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German mass communication study 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0030","justification":"Covers mass communication and media use in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1964, relevant to media and potentially business-related communication structures in the 1960s."},{"title":"German mass communication study 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0031","justification":"Examines media usage, communication patterns and media structures in Germany in 1969, directly within the 1960s timeframe and related to media."},{"title":"The entrepreneur in the Federal Republic of Germany (German Business Panel) 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2227","justification":"Investigates entrepreneurs and business conditions in West Germany in 1964; directly related to business/industrial management and organisation in Germany in the 1960s."},{"title":"The entrepreneur in the Federal Republic of Germany (German Business Panel) 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2228","justification":"Panel follow-up on entrepreneurs and firms in West Germany in 1966, focused on business structure and organisation in the 1960s."},{"title":"The entrepreneur in the Federal Republic of Germany (German Business Panel) 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2229","justification":"Continues the German Business Panel in 1968, providing data on business management, firm organisation and entrepreneurial activity in 1960s Germany."},{"title":"Public opinion on press, radio and television in the Federal Republic (Media Survey 1964)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0197","justification":"Study of public attitudes toward press, radio and television in West Germany in 1964; directly focused on media in the 1960s."},{"title":"Public opinion on press, radio and television in the Federal Republic (Media Survey 1966)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0198","justification":"Follow-up survey on press, radio and television in West Germany in 1966; examines media landscape and usage in the 1960s."},{"title":"Public opinion on press, radio and television in the Federal Republic (Media Survey 1968)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0199","justification":"Continuation of the media surveys in West Germany in 1968, covering media consumption and evaluation within the 1960s period."},{"title":"German election study 1965 (pre- and post-election study)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0221","justification":"Includes modules on media consumption and campaign information sources in West Germany in 1965, linking media exposure with political behaviour during the 1960s."},{"title":"ALLBUS Pilot Study 1966: Attitudes toward economy and media","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0501","justification":"Pilot survey covering attitudes toward economic conditions and media in West Germany around 1966, relevant to both business context and media in 1960s Germany."}]}
